description: Triggered when the user is working on an Astro project, building a static site, using Content Collections, Islands architecture, or migrating from another framework to Astro.
should_trigger: Set up a blog with Astro 5 using Content Collections
How do I add a React island component to my Astro page?
Create an Astro layout with i18n support for Italian and English
How do I implement SSR mode in Astro with a node adapter?
Set up image optimization in Astro using astro:assets
Create an API endpoint in Astro for a contact form
How do I add Tailwind CSS to my Astro project?
should_not_trigger: Set up a Next.js app with App Router and server components
How do I add React components to a SvelteKit project?
Create a Nuxt 3 page with SSR data fetching
Deploy my Express.js API to a Docker container
